title: Meet May at the Viewpoint
learning_goal: Start the loop with a friendly greeting and ask for help.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Hello! Welcome to the Ha Giang Loop.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Hello, nice to meet you. My name is Linh.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Linh. I can help you find the first viewpoint.

npc_line: Hello! Welcome to the Ha Giang Loop. Are you ready for the first viewpoint?
choices: Hello, nice to meet you. My name is Linh.
Good night. I am going to sleep now.
My bike has a broken light.
hint: May is meeting you for the first time. Choose a warm first sentence.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng chào May, nói tên của bạn, và phù hợp khi gặp hướng dẫn viên lần đầu. Rất tự nhiên và thân thiện.

title: Ask for the Viewpoint Road
learning_goal: Ask for a simple direction and repeat the route.
key_phrases: Turn left at the blue sign.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Where is the viewpoint?

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Go straight, then turn left at the blue sign.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Go straight, then turn left. Thank you.

npc_line: Go straight, then turn left at the blue sign.
choices: Go straight, then turn left at the blue sign.
I would like soup and rice, please.
It costs ten minutes.
hint: Repeat the road words so May knows you understood the route.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng nhắc lại chỉ đường: đi thẳng rồi rẽ trái ở biển màu xanh. Khi du lịch, lặp lại chỉ dẫn giúp tránh nhầm đường.

title: Check the Road Safety
learning_goal: Ask if the road is safe before riding.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Is the road safe today?

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: It is foggy near the pass. Please ride slowly.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Okay. I will ride slowly.

npc_line: It is foggy near the pass. Please ride slowly.
choices: Okay. I will ride slowly.
Can I have more tea?
The wheel is loose.
hint: May gives safety advice. Choose the answer that accepts the advice.
explanation_vi: May nói đường có sương mù và khuyên đi chậm. Câu đúng xác nhận bạn hiểu và sẽ đi chậm để an toàn.

title: Tell May Your Route Plan
learning_goal: Say a simple route plan for the next part of the loop.
key_phrases: I will go to the village.
I plan to leave in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: What is your plan after the viewpoint?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: I will go to the village and stop before dark.

dialogue.speaker: May
dialogue.text: Good plan. The road is easier before dark.

npc_line: What is your plan after the viewpoint?
choices: I will go to the village and stop before dark.
Thank you for the dinner. It was delicious.
Could you fix the brake, please?
hint: Use “I will...” to talk about your next travel step.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng dùng “I will...” để nói kế hoạch tiếp theo: đi đến bản và dừng trước khi trời tối. Đây là kế hoạch an toàn.

title: Tell Binh the Bike Problem
learning_goal: Name a simple bike problem and ask for a check.

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Hi. What is the problem?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: The brake feels weak. Can you check it?

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Yes. I will check the brake and tire.

npc_line: Hi. What is the problem with your bike?
choices: The brake feels weak. Can you check it?
Where is the mountain viewpoint?
I will eat dinner at seven.
hint: Binh needs the bike part and the problem, not a long story.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng nói rõ bộ phận xe: brake (phanh) và vấn đề: feels weak (yếu). Sau đó nhờ kiểm tra rất lịch sự.

title: Ask Binh for Help
learning_goal: Make a polite request when you need repair help.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Could you help me, please?

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Of course. Please wait here.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you for your help.

npc_line: I can fix it. Please wait here.
choices: Thank you. Could you fix it, please?
This place is beautiful and quiet.
Turn right at the market.
hint: Use “could you” plus “please” to sound polite and calm.
explanation_vi: “Could you fix it, please?” là cách nhờ sửa xe lịch sự. Thêm “Thank you” giúp câu nghe thân thiện hơn.

title: Confirm Repair Time and Cost
learning_goal: Confirm how long a repair takes and how much it costs.

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: It will take twenty minutes and cost fifty thousand dong.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Okay. Twenty minutes and fifty thousand dong.

dialogue.speaker: Binh
dialogue.text: Yes. I will start now.

npc_line: It will take twenty minutes and cost fifty thousand dong.
choices: Okay. Twenty minutes and fifty thousand dong.
I need one room for tonight.
Is the road foggy today?
hint: Repeat the time and price to confirm you understand.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng lặp lại thời gian và giá tiền. Khi sửa xe, xác nhận như vậy giúp tránh hiểu nhầm.

title: Check In with Lan
learning_goal: Check in at a homestay and introduce yourself.
key_phrases: I have a room for tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Welcome to my homestay. Do you have a booking?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Yes. I have a room for tonight. My name is Linh.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Great. Your room is ready.

npc_line: Welcome to my homestay. Do you have a booking?
choices: Yes. I have a room for tonight. My name is Linh.
The brake feels weak. Can you check it?
Go straight, then turn left.
hint: Lan asks about check-in. Say you have a room and give your name.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng dùng khi nhận phòng: xác nhận bạn có phòng tối nay và nói tên. Ngắn gọn, rõ ràng, lịch sự.

title: Order Dinner at the Homestay
learning_goal: Order a simple dinner politely after a long ride.
key_phrases: I would like rice and vegetables.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Dinner is at seven. What would you like?

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: I would like rice and vegetables, please.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Sure. Would you like tea too?

npc_line: Dinner is at seven. What would you like?
choices: I would like rice and vegetables, please.
The road is foggy near the pass.
Twenty minutes and fifty thousand dong.
hint: Lan asks about food. Use “I would like...” and “please.”
explanation_vi: Câu đúng gọi món ăn đơn giản bằng “I would like... please.” Đây là cách lịch sự khi ăn ở homestay hoặc quán nhỏ.

title: Thank Lan After Dinner
learning_goal: Thank a host and give a simple compliment.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Thank you for dinner. It was delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: You are welcome. I am happy you liked it.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: Your family is very kind.

choices: Yes. Thank you for dinner. It was delicious.
No. Turn left at the blue sign.
The tire is soft and the brake is weak.
hint: After someone cooks for you, thank them and say one nice detail.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng cảm ơn bữa tối và khen món ăn ngon. Đây là phản hồi thân thiện, dễ dùng trong đời thật.

title: Ask About Breakfast Time
learning_goal: Ask a host about breakfast time and a local custom politely.
key_phrases: Should I take off my shoes?

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Breakfast is simple here. We eat together in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Linh
dialogue.text: What time is breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: Lan
dialogue.text: Breakfast is at seven. Please take off your shoes inside.

npc_line: Breakfast is simple here. We eat together in the morning.
choices: What time is breakfast? Should I take off my shoes?
How much does the brake repair cost?
I will ride fast in the fog.
hint: Ask about time and house rules in a polite way.
explanation_vi: Câu đúng hỏi giờ ăn sáng và hỏi có nên cởi giày không. Đây là cách tôn trọng văn hóa và quy định của chủ nhà.
